<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Subscribers; use Pest\Logging\Converter; use Pest\Logging\TeamCity\TeamCityLogger; use Pest\TestSuite; use PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner\Configured; use PHPUnit\Event\TestRunner\ConfiguredSubscriber; use Symfony\Component\Console\Input\InputInterface; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\OutputInterface; /** * @internal */ final readonly class EnsureTeamCityEnabled implements ConfiguredSubscriber { /** * Creates a new Configured Subscriber instance. */ public function __construct( private InputInterface $input, private OutputInterface $output, private TestSuite $testSuite, ) {} /** * Runs the subscriber. */ public function notify(Configured $event): void { if (! $this->input->hasParameterOption('--teamcity')) { return; } $flowId = getenv('FLOW_ID'); $flowId = is_string($flowId) ? (int) $flowId : getmypid(); new TeamCityLogger( $this->output, new Converter($this->testSuite->rootPath), $flowId === false ? null : $flowId, getenv('COLLISION_IGNORE_DURATION') !== false ); } }
